title: delivery process_batch fetches post data per-inbox instead of per-post
description: In delivery.rs process_batch(), the post content query (lines 172-188) runs inside the per-delivery loop. When multiple delivery_queue rows target different inboxes for the same post_id, the same post content is fetched N times. Group deliveries by post_id and fetch each post's content once. This is the same class of issue as the private key fetch but for a different query.
close_reason: Same fix as ec6y.2 — post query hoisted into per-post cache block
